ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS County Code */,
  "county_seat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county seat */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the county was established */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the county */,
  "etymology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the etymology of the county name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the map of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the county information */,
  "historical_notes" TEXT /* Additional historical notes about the county */,
  "geographic_features" TEXT /* Key geographic features of the county */,
  "bordering_counties" TEXT /* List of bordering counties */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the county */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_etymology_id FOREIGN KEY ("etymology_id") REFERENCES etymologies ("etymology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_county_seat_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_seat_id") REFERENCES county_seats ("seat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_seats" (
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county seat */,
  "seat_name" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county seat */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county seat */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county seat */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the county seat */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the county seat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_description" TEXT /* Description of the origin (e.g., formed from other counties, historical context) */,
  "source_document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a document or source that provides more detailed information about the origin */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the origin information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etymologies" (
  "etymology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each etymology */,
  "etymology_description" TEXT /* Description of the etymology (e.g., named after a historical figure) */,
  "source_document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a document or source that provides more detailed information about the etymology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the etymology information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etymology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data (e.g., census, estimate) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_data" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the area data (e.g., official records, estimates) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the area data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "map_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the map image */,
  "map_file_size" REAL /* Size of the map file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the map was uploaded */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of map (e.g., topographic, political) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., legislative, social, economic) */,
  "source_document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a document or source that provides more detailed information about the event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the event information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_events_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, government official, public) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the county data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the county data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
